title: lastrea hunsteiniana
side_effects: Lastrea hunsteiniana can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, which may cause symptoms like hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In rare cases, improper use of Lastrea hunsteiniana can also cause interactions with other medications, resulting in decreased effectiveness or increased risk of side effects. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid potential harm.
